scenes.summary: 새벽빛이 한강과 서울 스카이라인을 비추며 여행의 시작을 알린다.
scenes.imagePrompt: A breathtaking sunrise over the Han River in Seoul, 2026 futuristic yet realistic skyline, soft golden light, Namsan Seoul Tower in the distance, emotional travel advertisement style, cinematic wide shot, high resolution
scenes.videoPrompt: Cinematic drone glide over the Han River at sunrise, Seoul skyline slowly glowing with warm light, gentle atmospheric haze, emotional travel commercial mood, smooth camera movement

scenes.summary: 전통 한옥 골목과 현대적인 도심이 자연스럽게 이어지는 서울의 대비를 보여준다.
scenes.narration: 오래된 시간과 새로운 꿈이 만나는 도시.
scenes.imagePrompt: Bukchon Hanok Village street in Seoul with traditional Korean houses, modern skyscrapers visible beyond the rooftops, warm morning light, elegant travelers walking, emotional advertising photography, cinematic composition
scenes.videoPrompt: Slow tracking shot through a peaceful hanok alley, camera reveals modern Seoul skyline beyond traditional rooftops, soft light, graceful movement, premium travel ad style

scenes.summary: 광화문, 청계천, 거리의 사람들 사이로 여행자가 서울의 활기를 느낀다.
scenes.imagePrompt: Vibrant Seoul city scene near Gwanghwamun and Cheonggyecheon, diverse travelers and locals smiling, city lights beginning to shine, emotional and inspiring tourism advertisement, cinematic realism
scenes.videoPrompt: Smooth montage-style motion through Gwanghwamun plaza and Cheonggyecheon stream, people walking, smiling, taking photos, soft city lights, uplifting emotional commercial pacing

scenes.summary: 밤의 서울에서 여행자가 반짝이는 도심을 바라보며 잊지 못할 순간을 맞이한다.
scenes.narration: 서울은 여행이 아니라, 오래 남을 마음입니다.
scenes.imagePrompt: Night view of Seoul from an overlook, sparkling city lights, traveler standing in silhouette looking over the city, Namsan Seoul Tower glowing, emotional finale, premium travel advertisement, cinematic night photography
scenes.videoPrompt: Slow push-in behind a traveler overlooking Seoul at night, glittering city lights and Namsan Tower in view, gentle breeze, emotional inspiring finale, cinematic travel commercial style
